title: デビュー戦の後に・サイコーの初陣！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
My debut race was HOTTER THAN HOT! Even
though I ran at top speed, I still wanna push
myself to be faster next time!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Trainer and I have decided to spend my junior
year on my very own training arc!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
First, I have to build up some real racing
experience so we can figure out what kind of
races suit me best!
